name: Core Set 2020

draft.notes: Foil odds changed to 1:45 (from 1:67 in prior sets). Land slot holds a basic land (~13/24 of the time) or another common land (11 extra common lands). If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare.

statedRates: consistent with common foil rate ~1/5, uncommon foil ~1/12, rare foil ~1/20 (total ~1/3 of the 15/45)
sourceNotes: Core set. Normal large-set size plus 11 extra common lands. Four basic land variations. Printed USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box.
